payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Beige fabric (slightly pleated) lampshade on an ornate dark wood/bronze turned base; lamp is switched on with a warm yellow glow, casting light on the nearby surface; top-left of the shade is slightly cropped by the image border; approximate distance from camera ~0.6 m.
attributes: ornate dark wood or bronze base
